question: According to Zaitsev rule
option1: Hydrogen is removed from that carbon which contain least no. of hydrogen atoms
option2: Hydrogen is removed from that carbon which contain greater no. of hydrogen atoms
option3: Hydrogen is removed from that carbon which is attached to halogen atom
remarks: Correct answer is "Hydrogen is removed from that carbon which contain least no. of hydrogen atoms"
